# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Resources:
  SQSQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub "sqs-queue-${AWS::Region}"
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 34560
      VisibilityTimeout: 300

  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "sns-topic-${AWS::Region}"

  SQSTopicSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueueSubscription
    DependsOn:
      - SQSQueue
      - SNSTopic
    Properties:
      QueueUrl:
        Ref: SQSQueue
      TopicArn:
        Ref: SNSTopic

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref SQSQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - 'sqs:GetMessage'
              - 'sqs:DeleteMessage'
              - 'sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility'
            Resource:
              Fn::Join:
                - ''
                -
                  - !GetAtt SQSQueue.Arn
                  - ':*'

Outputs:
  SNSArn:
    Value:
      Ref: SNSTopic
  SQSArn:
    Value:
      Fn::GetAtt: [SQSQueue, Arn]
